raw_block:
First mention of —Ge 9:20,21.
Was made of
  The juice of the grape. —Ge 49:11.
  The juice of the pomegranate. —Song 8:2.
First mode of making, notice —Ge 40:11.
Generally made by treading the grapes in a press —Ne 13:15;Isa 63:2,3.
Refining of, alluded to —Isa 25:6.
Improved by age —Lu 5:39.
Places celebrated for
  Canaan in general. —De 33:28.
  Possessions of Judah. —Ge 49:8,11,12.
  Lebanon. —Ho 14:7.
  Helbon. —Eze 27:18.
  Assyria. —2Ki 18:32;Isa 36:17.
  Moab. —Isa 16:8-10;Jer 48:32,33.
Many kinds of —Ne 5:18.
Sweet, esteemed for flavour and strength —Isa 49:26;Am 9:13;Mic 6:15.
Red, most esteemed —Pr 23:31;Isa 27:2.
Often spiced to increase its strength, &c —Pr 9:2,5;23:30;Song 8:2.
Was used
  As a beverage from the earliest age. —Ge 9:21;27:25.
  At all feasts and entertainments. —Es 1:7;5:6;Isa 5:12;Da 5:1-4;Joh 2:3.
  For drink offerings in the worship of God. —Ex 29:40;Nu 15:4-10.
  For drink offerings in idolatrous worship. —De 32:37,38.
  As a medicine. —Lu 10:34;1Ti 5:23

reference_groups.entry_label: First fruits of, to be offered to God —De 18:4;2Ch 31:5.
reference_groups.raw_segment: First fruits of, to be offered to God —De 18:4;2Ch 31:5.

reference_groups.entry_label: With corn and oil, denoted all temporal blessings —Ge 27:28,37;Ps 4:7;Ho 2:8;Joe 2:19.

reference_groups.entry_label: Given in abundance to the Jews when obedient —Ho 2:22;Joe 2:19,24;Zec 9:17.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Given in abundance to the Jews when obedient —Ho 2:22;Joe 2:19,24;Zec 9:17.

reference_groups.entry_label: The Jews frequently deprived of, as a punishment —Isa 24:7,11;Ho 2:9;Joe 1:10;Hag 1:11;2:16.
reference_groups.raw_segment: The Jews frequently deprived of, as a punishment —Isa 24:7,11;Ho 2:9;Joe 1:10;Hag 1:11;2:16.

reference_groups.entry_label: The Jews frequently drank, to excess —Isa 5:11;Joe 3:3;Am 6:6.
reference_groups.raw_segment: The Jews frequently drank, to excess —Isa 5:11;Joe 3:3;Am 6:6.

reference_groups.entry_label: In times of scarcity, was mixed with water —Isa 1:22.
reference_groups.raw_segment: In times of scarcity, was mixed with water —Isa 1:22.

reference_groups.entry_label: Sometimes mixed with milk as a beverage —Song 5:1.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Sometimes mixed with milk as a beverage —Song 5:1.

reference_groups.entry_label: Custom of giving to persons in pain or suffering, mixed with drugs —Pr 31:6;Mr 15:23.

reference_groups.entry_label: Forbidden to the priests while engaged in the tabernacle —Le 10:9.

reference_groups.entry_label: Forbidden to Nazarites during their separation —Nu 6:3.

reference_groups.entry_label: Consequence of putting (when new), into old bottles —Mt 2:22.
